# SakuttoWorks: Agentic Infrastructure & RAG Ecosystem

## Overview
Expert AI Software Architect & Technical Co-founder. Developing **Agent-Commerce-OS**, a production-ready **BaaS (Backend-as-a-Service)** framework designed for secure data retrieval, autonomous agent scaling, and structured API execution.

## Official Links & Ecosystem
- **Official Portal**: [Sakutto Works Official Site](https://sakutto.works)
- **API Edge Gateway**: [Sakutto Works API](https://api.sakutto.works)
- **GitHub Profile**: [SakuttoWorks GitHub](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks)
- **Profile Repository**: [SakuttoWorks Profile Repo](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/SakuttoWorks)

### Open Source Repositories
- **[Layer A] agent-commerce-gateway**: [agent-commerce-gateway Repo](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-gateway)
- **[Layer B] agent-commerce-core**: [agent-commerce-core Repo](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-core)
- **[Layer C] ghost-ship-mcp-server**: [ghost-ship-mcp-server Repo](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/ghost-ship-mcp-server)
- **[Discovery] agent-commerce-portal**: [agent-commerce-portal Repo](https://github.com/SakuttoWorks/agent-commerce-portal)

### Access & Provisioning
- **Pricing & Access**: Freemium model (First 100 requests/month FREE). Beyond that, $0.10/call.
- **API Key Checkout ($0.10/call)**: [Get API Key via Polar.sh](https://buy.polar.sh/polar_cl_mps3G1hmCTmQWDYYEMY2G1c7sojN3Tul6IhjO4EtVuj)

## Support the Architecture
If my open-source infrastructure or MCP servers are adding value to your AI agents, consider supporting the continued development:
- ☕ **One-time Tip (Polar.sh)**: [Send a One-time Tip](https://buy.polar.sh/polar_cl_ZI9H5fL8dQqcormOadiGDFDpS2Sxd1jT05jTX1vStWi)
- 💖 **Become a Sponsor**: [Sponsor on GitHub](https://github.com/sponsors/SakuttoWorks)

## Engineering Standards
- **AEO (Agent Engine Optimization)**: Semantic naming and self-documenting structures for seamless LLM discovery.
- **Enterprise Auditability**: End-to-end Trace ID propagation for full observability and compliance.
- **Data Integrity**: Designed for transparent data processing, strict schema compliance, and zero-hallucination architectures.
